utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 6 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes all six of these items with full detail. Each field contains the necessary information and costs. Therefore, all 6 items are covered and fully specified.
